---
species: "Crepidula fornicata"
accepted_code: "CRFO"
alternate_codes: ["CF", "CRSP"]
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Slipper snail"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Small with white/brownish markings, often found in curved stacks of multiple individuals. Use CRSP if you cannot distinguish species"
image: '/header_images/Crepidula_fornicata.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo by Misjel Decleer via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=138566&tid=138963)' # MUST have an image credit
categories:
  - gastropods
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: ""
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "138963"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
